# Ike Change Set

> The released form of the IkeFoundation knowledge set: ike:knowledge-export replays
> the ledger and attaches the protobuf change set (classifier: changeset). A
> starter set is exactly this artifact applied to an empty base.

## Other

- [Dependencies (SBOM)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-changeset/dependencies.html.md)
- [Licenses (SPDX)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-changeset/licenses.html.md)
- [Built With](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-changeset/built-with.html.md)

## Overview

- [About](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-changeset/index.html.md)
